chrome.selectProject: Select a project from the sidebar.
chrome.dragInterviewsDescription: Add interview recordings or transcripts to get started.
chrome.projectUnavailableHint: Connect the drive to access this project.
chrome.projectMovedDescription: The project folder couldn’t be found. It may have been moved or deleted.
chrome.duplicateProjectMessage: A project for this folder already exists: “%@”. You can open the existing project or create a new one.
chrome.emptyStateHint: Drag a folder here or press ⌘N
chrome.multipleSelectedHint: Select a single project to view its report.

privacy.redactionIntro: PII redaction is opt-in. It’s off by default because false positives (redacting research-relevant text) damage data accuracy. The feature uses Microsoft Presidio, an open-source text scanner, with a configurable confidence threshold (default 0.7).
privacy.actionThreshold: For sensitive data, lower the confidence threshold (try 0.5) to catch more at the cost of more false positives.

contributing.beforeBody: See the contributing guide on GitHub for development setup and code quality checks.

configReference.intro: Most settings are in the Settings window (⌘,). Environment variable names are shown below for advanced configuration.

aiConsent.title: AI-Powered Analysis
aiConsent.intro: Bristlenose uses AI to analyse your interview transcripts. When you use a cloud provider, transcript data is sent to that provider's servers for processing.
aiConsent.notUsedForTraining: Your data is not used to train AI models. See each provider's terms for their data retention policies.
aiConsent.sentToCloudLabel: Sent to your chosen cloud provider
aiConsent.sentItem1: Processed interview transcripts (with PII redaction applied first, if enabled)
aiConsent.sentItem3: Analysis requests (topic segmentation, quote extraction, theme clustering)
aiConsent.sentSummary: Data sent to cloud provider: processed transcripts, speaker codes, and analysis requests
aiConsent.localItem2: Participant names, contact info, and personal details
aiConsent.localItem3: Your edits, tags, and report customisations
aiConsent.localSummary: Data that stays on your device: recordings, personal details, and your edits
aiConsent.providersIntro: Cloud providers that may process your data:
aiConsent.ollamaCallout: Ollama runs entirely on your device. No data leaves your machine.
aiConsent.researcherResponsibility: Ensure participants have been informed that their interview data may be processed by third-party AI services, as required by your research ethics approval.
